duplicate_clustering_role: authority anchor inside duplicate cluster; can serve as canonical cluster representative when scope matches
upgrade_condition: Independent corroboration or source text directly supporting core facts can justify high confidence and T3
minimum_fields_or_keys: jurisdiction; authority_name; document_title; url_or_path; access_date; language; quoted_finding; affected_actor_or_system
paper_thesis_use: Supports hostile-reviewer claim discipline by separating authoritative confirmation from weaker narrative coverage
uncertainty_or_limit: Authority documents may still be narrow, procedural, or incomplete about technical facts

duplicate_clustering_role: authority anchor; strong cluster node for procedural posture, sanctions, or fact findings
upgrade_condition: Use high confidence only for the facts actually stated in the judgment/order/filing, not for surrounding media embellishment
minimum_fields_or_keys: jurisdiction; court; case_number_if_public; document_title; procedural_posture; url_or_path; access_date; language
paper_thesis_use: Feeds thesis/paper discussion of legal-procedural edge cases while preserving narrow claim scope
uncertainty_or_limit: Court visibility is uneven and should not be treated as frequency evidence

duplicate_clustering_role: cluster bridge when linking official response, remediation, or admission to media and technical reporting
upgrade_condition: Require independent corroboration or authoritative follow-up before using as strongest support for contested facts
minimum_fields_or_keys: provider_or_company; notice_title; url_or_path; access_date; language; remediation_statement; scope_limit
paper_thesis_use: Useful for a response/remediation table without overstating truth of self-reporting
uncertainty_or_limit: Self-reports may minimize severity or selectively frame responsibility

duplicate_clustering_role: cluster stabilizer for research-integrity or benchmark-contamination cases
upgrade_condition: Peer-reviewed or editorial notices can support high confidence for narrowly described integrity/process facts
minimum_fields_or_keys: venue_or_editor; document_title; url_or_path; access_date; language; integrity_issue_type; citation_anchor
paper_thesis_use: Supports dataset/method paper argument that some edge cases are better captured as research-integrity anomalies
uncertainty_or_limit: Scholarly discussion may analyze rather than verify underlying real-world events

source_family_or_signal: Security research and advisories; AI vulnerability/security databases
duplicate_clustering_role: technical cluster anchor for security_risk and agentic_control_failure cases
upgrade_condition: Independent replication, multi-source advisory convergence, or official/vendor confirmation can raise confidence and sometimes T4
minimum_fields_or_keys: advisory_id_or_url; publisher; access_date; language; affected_system; mitigation_summary; dangerous_detail_redaction_flag
paper_thesis_use: Enables a reviewer-readable bridge from security advisories to LIMEN categories without reproducing exploit detail
uncertainty_or_limit: Technical advisories may omit deployment impact or affected-user scale

duplicate_clustering_role: crosswalk node and duplicate-detection helper across external IDs
upgrade_condition: Use for discovery and crosswalk support; promote confidence only when underlying cited sources are retrieved and assessed
minimum_fields_or_keys: aiid_or_other_external_id; title; event_date_if_known; source_links; jurisdiction_if_known; taxonomy_tags
paper_thesis_use: Supports the core LIMEN claim that residual cases can be compared against existing incident corpora rather than asserted in the abstract
uncertainty_or_limit: Aggregator records inherit the strengths and weaknesses of their underlying citations

duplicate_clustering_role: metadata cluster seed linking procurement, register, and later authority records
upgrade_condition: Upgrade confidence only after corroborating institution, vendor, audit, register-detail, or authority source is linked
minimum_fields_or_keys: jurisdiction; institution; register_or_tender_id; record_title; url_or_path; access_date; language; ai_relevance_note
paper_thesis_use: Supports bounded claims about observability gaps, procurement theater, and disclosure structure
uncertainty_or_limit: Presence or absence of a register/tender entry does not prove deployment quality, legality, or completeness

duplicate_clustering_role: lead-expansion node; useful for discovering aliases, dates, and linked public documents
upgrade_condition: Require either independent reporting convergence or a stronger authority source before high confidence claims
minimum_fields_or_keys: outlet; article_title; journalist_if_public; url_or_path; access_date; language; jurisdiction; linked_document_note
paper_thesis_use: Useful for narrative context and multilingual discovery while maintaining visibility-bias caution
uncertainty_or_limit: Media volume is visibility, not incident frequency; legal or technical claims may remain disputed

duplicate_clustering_role: weak cluster seed only; never canonical representative
upgrade_condition: Upgrade only if independently corroborated by stronger public sources; otherwise remain T0_lead
minimum_fields_or_keys: url_or_post_id; platform; access_date; language; summarized_claim; corroboration_queue_state
paper_thesis_use: Preserves discovery without contaminating published descriptive claims
uncertainty_or_limit: High false-positive and rumor risk; do not cite as case evidence

duplicate_clustering_role: weak cluster seed for normative or residual anomalies
upgrade_condition: Needs corroboration from news, official, company, or scholarly source before any strong confidence assignment
minimum_fields_or_keys: url_or_path; source_type; access_date; language; anomaly_note; candidate_limen_labels
paper_thesis_use: Supports the residual-category queue without pretending that novelty itself is evidence
uncertainty_or_limit: These signals are useful for atlas novelty but are especially vulnerable to anecdote and miscontext

duplicate_clustering_role: Compute provisional duplicate likelihood from shared event window, jurisdiction, actor overlap, system/provider overlap, crosswalk IDs, and near-duplicate title/summary patterns; select the highest-authority node as provisional cluster representative
upgrade_condition: Promote from provisional cluster to stable cluster only after human-readable rationale is stored in review notes or a cluster ledger row
minimum_fields_or_keys: event_dates; jurisdictions; actors; system_context.model_or_provider; title; summary; crosswalk ids; provenance.source_ids; duplicate_cluster_id
paper_thesis_use: Operationalizes the required duplicate-cluster graph and reduces reviewer concern about double counting across media, database, and authority surfaces
uncertainty_or_limit: No purely lexical rule is sufficient; multilingual aliasing and evolving incident descriptions can split or over-merge cases

duplicate_clustering_role: Confidence should never exceed what the strongest non-duplicate evidence node supports; duplicate count alone is not a confidence upgrade
upgrade_condition: High confidence normally requires either T3 authority support or convergent independent T2 support plus stable duplicate resolution; medium confidence fits T1/T2 records with coherent provenance; low confidence remains for T0 or unresolved disputes
minimum_fields_or_keys: evidence_tier; authority_class_of_best_source; independent_source_count; dispute_flag; machine_translation_flag; duplicate_resolution_state; provenance.review_notes
paper_thesis_use: Creates a reviewer-facing explanation for the schema's confidence field and helps avoid inflating weak but repeated public claims
dashboard_hook: confidence-by-tier dashboard card and cluster-level uncertainty legend
uncertainty_or_limit: Machine translation, self-reporting, and aggregator chaining can all falsely simulate corroboration if source independence is not checked
